market: AI is still an infrastructure-and-distribution market first. NVIDIA and Microsoft remain the cleanest evidence-backed monetizers, while broad app-layer profit capture is still less proven than the narrative suggests.
tech: Enterprise adoption is deepening in structured workflows and reasoning-heavy usage, but real commercial value is still concentrated in coding, search, support, and other high-value knowledge tasks rather than everywhere at once.
risk: Main risks are power and capacity bottlenecks, capex outrunning downstream software monetization, model-layer commoditization, and tighter export-control or compliance regimes splitting the market by geography and policy.
